title: Hasaq (disambiguation)
content:
'''Hasaq''' may refer to one of the following:

*The '''[[Hasaq system/Legends|Hasaq system]]''', an [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region]] [[Star system/Legends|star system]]
*'''[[Hasaq's sun]]''', a [[Star/Legends|star]] in the Hasaq system

{{Disambig}}
